title: Tasty Golden Crispy Mustardy Yakitori Pan-Fried Skewers
description: A light and gluten-free-friendly one-pot Portuguese dish featuring golden crispy yakitori skewers marinated in a savory mustard sauce.

ingredients.name: Yakitori
ingredients.notes: 4 skewers made from boneless chicken thighs or breast meat

ingredients.name: Mustard Sauce
ingredients.notes: Dijon mustard and honey for a light and tangy flavor

instructions: Prepare the skewers by marinating in Mustard Sauce for at least an hour, flipping occasionally.
Preheat a cast iron skillet over medium-high heat with Ghee. Once hot, add the marinated skewers and cook until golden brown on each side (about 5 minutes).
Once cooked, remove from skillet and serve immediately to enjoy the crispy texture and mustardy sauce.
